intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/15. 5:00 at 85%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 85%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 85% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Power: 85-85%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/15. 0:15 at 130%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 130% FTP, Standing. 15s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/15. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 13 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/15. 130% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/15. 130% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/15. 4:45 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 85% FTP, Seated. 4:45. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 85%, 90-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/15. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 19% into session. 85%, 90-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/15. 0:15 at 130%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 25% complete. Rep 4/15. 130% at 90-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25% through. This is your workout. Own it. 130% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/15. 130% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25% complete. Rep 4/15. 130% for 15s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/15. 4:45 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 25% complete. Rep 5/15. 85% at 90-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25% done. 10 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/15. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/15. 85% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/15. 5:00 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/3. 85% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 30 minutes of work done. 45 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 6/15. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% complete. Rep 6/15. 85% for 5:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/15. 43% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 130% for 0:15. Then 0:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 43% done. 8 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 43% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Power: 130-130%, Cadence: 85-90 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 85% for 4:45. Then 40min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 85% × 4:45. Then 40min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 8/15. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 7 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8/15. 35 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 7 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 4:45 at 85%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 130% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/15. 130-130% FTP, 85-90 rpm, Standing. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15s at 130%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 9/15. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 130% × 15s. Standing, 85-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 50% done. 5 intervals left. 35 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 85% for 4:45. Then 5:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50% through. This is your workout. Own it. 85% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 85% for 4:45. Then 35min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 10. 5 to go. 35 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 55% for 5:00. Then 0:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% through. This is your workout. Own it. 85% FTP.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery
